level.setting: The Weeping Catacombs of Eternal Frost

pickup.name: Vial of Pure Napalm
pickup.effect: Doubles the damage of the next three fire spells

encounters.trigger: A massive stone portcullis lifts, revealing the Hall of Echoes

enemy.name: Crystalline Golem
enemy.weakness: Vial of Pure Napalm used on the staff

encounters.hazard: Shattering glass shards falling from the ceiling

pickup.name: Sun-Infused Ember
pickup.effect: Passively increases fire resistance by fifty percent

encounters.trigger: The Golem's death rattle shatters a barrier to the Inner Sanctum

encounters.hazard: Freezing winds that sap health over time

pickup.name: Phoenix Feather Essence
pickup.effect: Fully heals the player and grants a temporary flame shield

encounters.trigger: The Wraith dissolves into a freezing mist that guides the player to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: Aurelius the Glacial Lich
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the four braziers using the Phoenix Feather Essence to melt the Lich's core

level.objective: Retrieve the Everlasting Flame from the heart of the catacombs

level.setting: The Glimmering Marsh of Whispering Toads

pickup.name: Sparkle-Berry Treat
pickup.effect: Dazzles insects and small critters

encounters.trigger: A path of glowing butterflies opens toward the Crystal Cave.

pickup.name: Silver Chime-Bell
pickup.effect: Calms enraged giants

encounters.trigger: The cave walls hum a melody that reveals a hidden grotto.

pickup.name: Jar of Star-Honey
pickup.effect: The favorite snack of the Forest King

encounters.trigger: The Bramble-Hedgehog rolls away, uncovering the boss arena entrance.

boss.name: Barnaby the Bumble-Bear
boss.victory_condition: Feed Barnaby the Star-Honey until he falls asleep for a nap.

level.objective: Tame the distracted Forest King to restore peace to the marsh.
level.reward: The title of Master of the Whispering Toads and a Golden Flute.

level.setting: The Desecrated Sepulcher of the Sun King

pickup.name: Blessed Oil of Radiance
pickup.effect: Adds fire damage to the next 3 attacks

encounters.trigger: The Revenant drops a rusted key that unlocks the door to the Ossuary.

pickup.name: Fragment of the Solar Aegis
pickup.effect: Grants temporary immunity to shadow-based projectiles

encounters.trigger: The beast's death howl shatters the floor, dropping the player into the Sanctum of Silence.

pickup.name: Vial of Purest Essence
pickup.effect: Increases Holy Morningstar damage by 100 percent for the boss fight

encounters.trigger: The Priest's soul dissolves into a beam of light that points the way to the King's Tomb.

boss.name: Lich King Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Lich King's phylactery and cleanse the throne room.

level.objective: Infiltrate the royal tomb and eliminate the source of the spreading rot.
level.reward: The Title of Dawnbringer and a permanent 10 percent health increase.

enemy.name: Void Stalker
enemy.weakness: Light refracted through the Crystal Prism

pickup.name: Silver Bell of Resonance
pickup.effect: Dispels auditory illusions

encounters.trigger: The sound of the Silver Bell vibrates the walls, revealing a hidden doorway to the Cloister.

encounters.hazard: Sonic screams that drain health over time

pickup.name: Vial of Mercury Sight
pickup.effect: Allows the user to see heat signatures of cold-blooded beings

encounters.trigger: Drinking the Vial reveals a thermal path leading directly into the Heart of the Labyrinth.

enemy.name: Frostfire Elemental
enemy.weakness: Crystal Prism of Refraction focused on its core

pickup.name: Heart of the Sunstone
pickup.effect: Provides immunity to shadow-based magic

encounters.trigger: The warmth of the Sunstone melts the sealed obsidian gate to the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Malphas the Shadow Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Defeat the boss by exposing its true form with the Sunstone and shattering its shadow vessel with the Prism.

level.objective: Infiltrate the Labyrinth and destroy the source of the eternal eclipse.
level.reward: The Zenith Mantle, granting permanent invisibility while stationary.

pickup.name: Sunlight Essence
pickup.effect: Increases damage against shadows

encounters.trigger: Opening the Gate of Petals leads to the Thrumming Glade.

pickup.name: Purified Dewdrop
pickup.effect: Heals 30 health and cleanses corruption

encounters.trigger: Activating the Stone Totem reveals the path to the Silver Pond.

pickup.name: Moonlight Bloom
pickup.effect: Provides a protective shield

encounters.trigger: Placing the Moonlight Bloom on the altar summons the Guardian.

boss.name: The Corrupted Heart-Tree
boss.victory_condition: Cleanse the Heart-Tree of blight using the shield's light

level.objective: Purify the ancient grove to restore the natural balance.
level.reward: The Guardian's Seed and permanent health upgrade.

pickup.name: Shimmering Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Reflects projectile attacks

encounters.trigger: Breaking the banshee's mirror opens the gateway to the Floating Forge.

pickup.name: Ever-Cold Ember
pickup.effect: Grants frost aura and reduces fire damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Golem causes the forge to collapse, dropping the player into the Frostfire Pit.

pickup.name: Heart of Chaos
pickup.effect: Doubles attack speed but drains health over time

encounters.trigger: The Hydra's death roar shatters the frozen seal on the Boss Sanctum.

boss.name: Xal'Gor the Unstable
boss.victory_condition: Shatter Xal'Gor's core while the Heart of Chaos is active.

level.objective: Traverse the unstable dimensions to slay the Avatar of Chaos.

level.setting: The Weeping Ossuary of the First King

pickup.name: Ethereal Salt
pickup.effect: Dissolves physical manifestations of undeath

encounters.trigger: Opening the salt-sealed door to the Bone Gardens

pickup.name: Vial of Pure Void
pickup.effect: Temporarily silences magical aura projections

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Marrow Golem's core to unlock the inner sanctum

pickup.name: First King's Sigil
pickup.effect: Bypasses royal necrotic shielding

encounters.trigger: Using the Sigil to descend into the Royal Vault

boss.name: Lich King Alaric
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sigil to break Alaric's shield and then execute him with the Soul-Reaping Scythe

level.objective: Retrieve the Crown of Souls from the depths of the Weeping Ossuary

pickup.name: Silver-Tipped Arrowhead
pickup.effect: Adds holy damage to the next 5 shots

encounters.trigger: A dying scream echoes, drawing the attention of a winged sentinel in the Spire.

pickup.name: Vial of Blighted Ichor
pickup.effect: Corrodes heavy armor on impact

encounters.trigger: The Seraphim's fall collapses the bridge, forcing the player into the Void Pit.

enemy.name: Hollowed Iron Golem
enemy.weakness: Vial of Blighted Ichor armor corrosion

pickup.name: Essence of the Abyss
pickup.effect: Grants temporary invulnerability to shadow energy

encounters.trigger: The Golem's destruction activates the ancient portal to the Throne of Ruin.

boss.name: Malakor the Soul-Eater
boss.weakness: Essence of the Abyss shadow resistance
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the boss's core while protected by the Essence of the Abyss.

level.objective: Traverse the desolate wastes to reclaim the stolen Crown of Thorns.
level.reward: The Crown of Thorns and the Title of Shadow-Walker.

enemy.name: Malfunctioning Weldbot
enemy.weakness: Omni-Wrench Arc Welder to the logic core

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Instantly freezes mechanical components

encounters.trigger: Override the terminal to unlock the Ventilation Shaft

pickup.name: EMP Burst Module
pickup.effect: Disables local shields for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: Reroute power to the Main Reactor Hub door

enemy.name: Security Sentinel Alpha
enemy.weakness: EMP Burst Module followed by Arc Welder strikes

pickup.name: Overcharged Capacitor
pickup.effect: Triples Arc Welder damage for one minute

encounters.trigger: Engage the emergency purge system to draw out the Core Overseer

boss.name: The Core Overseer
boss.weakness: The Overcharged Capacitor used on the central heat sink
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the primary cooling unit and escape the blast radius

level.objective: Infiltrate the processing rig and disable the rogue AI core

level.setting: An abandoned temporal research station orbiting a dying pulsar

pickup.name: Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Creates a localized gravity well

encounters.trigger: A security bulkhead opens, revealing the path to the Oxygen Garden.

pickup.name: Temporal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Freezes moving objects in time for three seconds

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion causes a hull breach, forcing the player into the Engineering Hull.

pickup.name: Flux Overdrive
pickup.effect: Doubles the frequency of chronal attacks

encounters.trigger: The Revenant's death releases a surge of energy that powers the elevator to the Bridge.

boss.name: The Paradox Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Sentinel's core while Flux Overdrive is active

level.objective: Prevent the station from collapsing into a black hole by stabilizing the central reactor.
level.reward: The Chronos-Key, unlocking the ability to rewind level progress.

level.setting: The collapsing orbital foundry 'Hyperion-9' spiraling into a gas giant.

pickup.name: Ionic Overload Module
pickup.effect: Triples electricity damage for one attack

encounters.trigger: Overloading the core door opens the ventilation shaft to the Lower Gantry.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the deck above

pickup.name: Static Friction Boots
pickup.effect: Negates knockback and stores kinetic energy as shield

encounters.trigger: The Automaton's explosion breaches the hull, pulling the player into the Cargo Hold.

encounters.hazard: Loose shipping containers moving at high speeds

pickup.name: Singularity Cell
pickup.effect: Creates a localized gravity well

encounters.trigger: The Ravager's death scream activates the emergency elevator to the Command Deck.

boss.name: Grand Overseer M.A.I.A.
boss.victory_condition: Collapse M.A.I.A.'s digital core using the Singularity Cell during her data-purge phase.

level.objective: Prevent the orbital foundry from detonating by eliminating the corrupted AI.

pickup.name: Ionized Battery Cell
pickup.effect: Adds electrical damage to weapon

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion unlocks the security door to the Bio-Dome.

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Flask
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Scanning the bot's remains reveals the access code for the Engine Room.

pickup.name: Overdrive Core
pickup.effect: Provides a massive power surge for one shot

encounters.trigger: The sentry's core overload powers up the elevator to the Bridge.

boss.name: The Rogue AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Directly hit the central processing unit with an Overdrive-charged strike.

level.objective: Investigate the silent distress signal and neutralize the corrupt AI.
level.reward: The Chronos Key and experimental jump-drive schematics.

level.setting: The derelict reactor core of the USG Ishimura-class vessel 'Void Stalker'

enemy.name: Frost-Bitten Sentry Droid
enemy.weakness: Phase-Shift Monomolecular Blade critical strikes to the exposed cooling vent

pickup.name: EMP Burst Grenade
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables electronic shields and stuns mechanical foes

encounters.trigger: A distress signal from the bridge unlocks the blast door to the Engineering Bay

enemy.name: Shielded Maintenance Drone
enemy.weakness: EMP Burst Grenade followed by a heavy blade slash

pickup.name: Overcharged Ion Battery
pickup.effect: Adds 50 electric damage to the next 5 weapon attacks

encounters.trigger: A terminal log reveal indicates the AI Core is malfunctioning, opening the elevator

enemy.name: Neural-Linked Cyborg Guard
enemy.weakness: Phase-Shift Monomolecular Blade strikes while the Overcharged Ion Battery is active

encounters.hazard: Sentient floor tiles that retract into the void

pickup.name: Nano-Virus Injector
pickup.effect: Corrupts organic and synthetic hybrid tissue over time

encounters.trigger: The security override triggers an emergency lockdown in the Command Sanctum

boss.name: The Architect AI-Hybrid
boss.weakness: Vulnerable to the Nano-Virus Injector which disables its regenerative armor
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to 0 and execute a Phase-Shift finisher on the primary uplink

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict vessel and neutralize the rogue AI before it initiates a planetary collision course.
level.reward: The 'Eclipse' Phase-Blade Upgrade and the 'Void Walker' title

pickup.name: Corrosive Phial
pickup.effect: Adds acid burn damage to the next 3 attacks

encounters.trigger: Airlock override opens the door to the Hydroponics Bay

pickup.name: Phosphorus Grenade
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary high-intensity light flash

encounters.trigger: Ventilation fans activate, clearing the path to the Cryo-Storage

pickup.name: Concentrated Oxidizer
pickup.effect: Multiplies chemical reaction intensity by five

encounters.trigger: The main vault door malfunctions and grinds open to the Boss Arena

boss.name: The Amalgamated Experiment
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the Oxidizer to trigger a chain reaction in the boss's core

level.objective: Retrieve the rogue genetic sequence from the heart of the facility.
level.reward: The Alchemist's Stone - A legendary artifact for matter transmutation.

pickup.name: Magnetic Confetti
pickup.effect: Short-circuits dancing machines

encounters.trigger: Opening the disco-ball airlock to the Synthesizer Lab

pickup.name: Liquid Seltzer Fuel
pickup.effect: Dissolves sugar-based armor

encounters.trigger: Activating the karaoke console to unlock the Kitchen

pickup.name: Giant Silver Toaster-Shield
pickup.effect: Reflects heat rays and jams giant mechanisms

encounters.trigger: Descending the chocolate elevator to the Bridge

boss.name: The Gigantic Jelly-O-Tron
boss.victory_condition: Jam the boss's central core using the Giant Silver Toaster-Shield

level.objective: Retrieve the Starlight Macaroon from the Bridge.
level.reward: The Title of Cosmic Pastry Knight and a Rocket-Powered Pogo Stick

level.setting: An ancient, bio-luminescent greenhouse floating in the void of deep space, filled with crystal sand and silent waterfalls.

encounters.hazard: Refractive light beams that drain health over time.

pickup.name: Echoing Resonance Shard
pickup.effect: Causes stone-based attacks to vibrate at high frequencies.

encounters.trigger: A door at the back of the grove pulses with light, leading to the Sunken Garden.

encounters.hazard: Deep pools of liquid mercury that slow movement drastically.

pickup.name: Magnetic Polarizer
pickup.effect: Allows the player to manipulate heavy metallic minerals.

encounters.trigger: The Golem crumbles into a bridge that spans the gap to the Astral Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent gravity fluctuations that fling the player toward spiked ceilings.

pickup.name: Stellar Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Infuses geological constructs with pure white-hole energy.

encounters.trigger: The Drake's death howl shatters the observatory dome, revealing the Boss's nest.

boss.name: The Singularity Warden
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the arena's central monolith with the Stellar Core Fragment to destabilize the Warden's form.

level.objective: Traverse the floating terrarium to retrieve the lost seed of a dying galaxy.
level.reward: The Genesis Spore and the title of Master World-Shaper.
